prestazioni: Engine: EP6CDT (1.6L Turbo Prince THP175) – forged internals with Manley I-beam connecting rods, Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.8:1 compression), and ACL Race Series bearings for 300+ HP reliability on E85 fuel. Upgraded oil pump from a PSA 1.6L WRC engine (part #9808337880) to handle 8,500 RPM redline.

Forced Induction: Garrett GT2867R turbo (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe (fabricated by French tuner *Dynachip*) and a *GReddy Type-S* blow-off valve. Intercooler upgraded to a *PWR Advanced Cooling* 550x220x76mm core with custom CNC-machined end tanks for the C4’s front bumper ducting.

Suspension & Handling: *Ohlins Road & Track DFV* coilovers (C4-specific valving) with *SuperPro* poly bushings (part #SPF0116K) for the rear trailing arms. Front sway bar upgraded to a *Whiteline* 24mm adjustable unit (part #BMR78X), paired with *Brembo GT* 330mm 2-piece rotors and *Ferodo DS2500* pads for endurance track use.
estetica: Aero: *Verkleidung* (German aftermarket) full carbon fiber widebody kit (C4 VTS-specific, not generic C4) with integrated *APR Performance* GT-250 rear wing (30mm risers for optimal angle). Front splitter is a *Seibon* carbon fiber unit with *MST* canards (part #MST-001) for high-speed stability.

Exterior: *3M Gloss Black* vinyl wrap with *Rally Armor* custom-cut mudflaps (C4 VTS logo laser-engraved). OEM headlights retrofitted with *Lux HID* projectors (35W 5500K) and *Morimoto* anti-flicker harness. Side mirrors replaced with *Sparco* carbon fiber units (part #00863NRB).

Wheels: *BBS CH-R II* 18x9.5 ET20 (front) and 18x10.5 ET25 (rear) in *Gloss Gunmetal*, wrapped in *Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2* tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear). Lug nuts upgraded to *Muteki SR48* titanium units (part #SR48-01).
